description: Add time saved metric showing parallel execution speedup in stats panel and completion overlay

userStories.description: In execute_stats.rs, calculate sequential_time as the sum of all completed story duration_secs values. Get wall_time from app.elapsed_secs() (or app.total_time_secs if final_stats is present). Compute saved_time = sequential_time - wall_time and multiplier = sequential_time / wall_time. Add a third Line to the summary_lines vec in render_stats_full() showing 'Saved: M:SS (X.Xx faster)' when there are 2+ completed stories and multiplier > 1.0, otherwise show '1.0x' without saved time. Use theme::SUCCESS for the saved time and theme::ACCENT for the multiplier. Ensure cargo build passes with zero warnings.
userStories.title: Add time saved calculation and display in Stats panel

userStories.description: In execute_completion.rs, calculate sequential_time as the sum of all completed story duration_secs values. Use total_time (from app.total_time_secs) as wall_time. Compute saved_secs = sequential_time - wall_time and multiplier = sequential_time as f64 / wall_time as f64. Add a prominent line after 'Total time' showing 'Time saved: M:SS with parallel execution (X.Xx speedup)' when stories > 1 and multiplier > 1.0, otherwise show 'Parallelism: 1.0x'. Increase box_height by 1 to accommodate. Use theme::SUCCESS with BOLD for the saved time text. Ensure cargo build passes with zero warnings.
userStories.title: Add time saved display in completion overlay
